source.derivation: Derived variant between the entry-level and intern layouts because no dedicated junior folder exists.
source.contentPolicy: Use the source files as layout and writing-style references only. Junior content should be generated from the JD and candidate data.

page.density: compact junior engineer layout with skills near the top

summary.heading: SUMMARY
summary.writingStyle: junior engineer with hands-on delivery, debugging, APIs, tests, cloud exposure, and growing ownership

skills.heading: SKILLS
skills.writingStyle: shorter than senior skills; only include tools that support the JD

experience.heading: EXPERIENCE
experience.bulletCount: 6-8 for current role, 4-5 for previous role

bulletWriting.pattern: Action verb + feature/service + technology + reliability, performance, or user impact

projects.heading: PROJECTS
projects.writingStyle: include projects when they fill JD gaps or show depth not covered by experience

education.heading: EDUCATION
education.writingStyle: brief; coursework optional only if strongly JD-relevant

aiInstructions.layoutPriority: Use skills before experience to improve ATS scanning for junior roles.
aiInstructions.contentGeneration: Generate junior-level content with implementation ownership but not senior architecture claims.
aiInstructions.jdTailoring: Use projects to fill missing JD keywords only when work experience does not cover them.
aiInstructions.outputRequirement: Return structured resume JSON matching this blueprint; do not return markdown.
